title: PR #41920 — reproduce order stuck in submitting state
description: Reviewer (@michalconsensys) reports perps order submission gets stuck in 'submitting' state on branch, not on main. Existing open-long-position flow hides this because handleBackClick navigates away before perpsPlaceOrder RPC resolves, so DOM 'market-detail-page' wait passes spuriously. This recipe submits a small ETH long on testnet and polls perpsGetPositions + perpsGetOpenOrders for up to 45s to verify the order actually settled (position size grew OR order filled). Fails explicitly if RPC never produces a position delta, which would match the reviewer's report.

ac3-poll-settlement.expression: (async()=>{var start=Date.now();var timeoutMs=45000;var intervalMs=500;var baseline=parseFloat({{vars.baseline.baselineEthSize}})||0;var baselineOpen={{vars.baseline.baselineOpenOrders}};var lastPositions=[];var lastOpen=[];var lastErr=null;while(Date.now()-start<timeoutMs){try{var p=await stateHooks.submitRequestToBackground('perpsGetPositions',[]);var o=await stateHooks.submitRequestToBackground('perpsGetOpenOrders',[]);lastPositions=p||[];lastOpen=o||[];var eth=lastPositions.find(function(x){return (x.symbol||'').toUpperCase()==='ETH'});var size=eth?parseFloat(eth.size)||0:0;var sizeDelta=Math.abs(size)-Math.abs(baseline);if(sizeDelta>0.00001){return JSON.stringify({settled:true,stuck:false,elapsedMs:Date.now()-start,sizeDelta:sizeDelta,newSize:size,baseline:baseline,openOrderCount:lastOpen.length})}}catch(e){lastErr=String(e)}await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,intervalMs)})}return JSON.stringify({settled:false,stuck:true,elapsedMs:Date.now()-start,baseline:baseline,finalEthSize:(lastPositions.find(function(x){return (x.symbol||'').toUpperCase()==='ETH'})||{size:'0'}).size,openOrderCount:lastOpen.length,openOrderSymbols:lastOpen.map(function(x){return x.symbol||''}),lastError:lastErr,reason:'perpsGetPositions did not show ETH size increase within '+timeoutMs+'ms — order likely stuck in submitting state (matches #41920 reviewer report)'})})()

done.message: Order submission settled within timeout — no stuck-submitting regression observed on this run.
